title: Neocussonia staufferiana
taxonomy: Neocussonia staufferiana is classified as an extinct species of plant that belongs to the family of Bennettitaceae. Bennettitaceae is a group of ancient gymnosperms, which are a type of seed plant characterized by the production of seeds on the female cones. This family is often referred to as cycadeoids. Neocussonia staufferiana is considered a key fossil find in the study of ancient plant evolution. The classification of Neocussonia staufferiana is primarily based on its fossil record and morphological characteristics.
